label: Sparse, local, linear & recurrent attention

node.label: Sparse, local, linear & recurrent attention
node.definition: Approximations or structured sparsity reduce the memory and compute cost of all-pairs attention.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Sparse, local, linear & recurrent attention is modeled as depending on Self-attention, Algorithms & data structures and feeding downstream nodes such as xLSTM & linear-recurrent hybrids, Long-context attention, compression & summarization memory, Paged attention & KV-memory management.
examples: atlas downstream link to xLSTM & linear-recurrent hybrids
atlas downstream link to Long-context attention, compression & summarization memory
atlas downstream link to Paged attention & KV-memory management
limitations: Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Self-attention, Algorithms & data structures.

dependencies.rationale: Sparse, local, linear & recurrent attention is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Self-attention.

In this atlas graph, Sparse, local, linear & recurrent attention has a `uses` dependency on Algorithms & data structures because Algorithms & data structures is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.

In this atlas graph, Sparse, local, linear & recurrent attention has a `uses` dependency on Complexity & computability because Complexity & computability is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.
